compiled_state.description:
## Finding (DE2 — reduced scope, verified)
`_call_with_backoff` is a full exponential-backoff+jitter retry wrapper that is DEAD in production (only a unit test calls it) yet publicly re-exported in `acli.py __all__` — a decoy that misleads anyone tuning reconciler retry policy (production uses `_run_acli`'s own inline loop). Per maintainer decision, scope is DECOY DELETION ONLY (do NOT consolidate the live schedules — keeping per-site numbers is deliberate).

Citations: `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/acli_subprocess.py:236` (`_call_with_backoff`); re-export at `acli.py:57,98`; sole caller `tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_error_taxonomy.py:88`.

## Remediation
Delete `_call_with_backoff`; remove its import + `__all__` entry in `acli.py`; delete or retarget the sole test to the live `_run_acli` path.

cascade_flag: deletes a publicly re-exported symbol — grep importers + the test before removal.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `_call_with_backoff` is removed from acli_subprocess.py and acli.py `__all__`
- [ ] The sole test is retargeted to the live retry path or removed
- [ ] Live retry schedules elsewhere are left unchanged (no retune)
compiled_state.title: Delete the dead publicly-exported _call_with_backoff retry decoy
